
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(sf)
source(here("general_functions.R"))
outpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "outputs")
plotpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "plots")
```

```{r}
wpi <- read_table(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "58-Sceloporus_10kb_windowpi.windowed.pi"))
cold_individuals <- read_csv(here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "outputs", "cold_individuals.txt"))

i  <- 
  wpi %>% 
  count(CHROM) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  # Pull out long scaffolds (chr and Scaffold_13)
  filter(n > 1000) %>% 
  pull(CHROM)

gg_df <-
  wpi %>%
  filter(CHROM %in% i) %>%
  mutate(CUMSUM = cumsum(BIN_START)) %>%
  mutate(CHROM = factor(CHROM, levels = i)) 


pdf(here(plotpath, "windowed_pi.pdf"), width = 12, height = 10)
ggplot(gg_df) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = BIN_START, col = PI), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(x = BIN_START, y = PI), alpha = 0.9, lwd = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~CHROM, scales = "fixed", ncol = 1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10), legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", direction = -1) +
  labs(y = expression("Mean " * pi * " (10kb window)"), col =expression("Mean " * pi * " (10kb window)"))
dev.off()
```

# Look at non-synonymous SNPs of interest
```{r}
goi <- read_csv(here(outpath, "Table_S7.csv"))

flank <- 500000

goi_plot_df <- goi %>%
  mutate(
    CHROM = scaffold,
    pos = position,
    window_start = pmax(0, pos - flank),
    window_end = pos + flank,
    snp_id = paste0(gene, ":", CHROM, ":", scales::comma(pos))
  ) %>%
  select(gene, CHROM, pos, window_start, window_end, snp_id)

plot_df <- 
  goi_plot_df %>%
  inner_join(gg_df, by = "CHROM") %>%
  filter(BIN_START >= window_start, BIN_START <= window_end) %>%
  mutate(rel_pos = BIN_START - pos)

# summary across SNPs at each relative position
ribbon_df <- 
  plot_df %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pi = mean(PI, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_pi = sd(PI, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ymin = mean_pi - sd_pi,
    ymax = mean_pi + sd_pi
  )

mean_pi_global <- mean(plot_df$PI, na.rm = TRUE)

png(here(plotpath, "windowed_pi_100kb_around_goi_snps.png"), width = 8, height = 8, units = "in", res = 300)
ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = BIN_START, y = PI)) +
  geom_rect(data = ribbon_df, aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf), fill = "skyblue2", alpha = 0.2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = ribbon_df$mean_pi, linetype = "dashed", col = "skyblue2") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = pos), col = "tomato2", linetype = "solid") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::scientific) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~ snp_id, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "Position relative to focal SNP (bp)",
    y = expression("Mean " * pi * " (10 kb window)")
  ) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9)
  )

dev.off()
```
